name: ArGo - Prefill set
summary: This sleek and odour-proof case is designed to conveniently transport your stash for the Arizer ArGo.
description: This sleek and odour-proof case is designed to conveniently transport your stash for the Arizer ArGo. It can hold up to five pre-filled glass aroma tubes and a stainless steel stirring tool, making it the perfect companion for discreetly enjoying your herbs in style. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
